# terrible_community_general_scaleway_security_group (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the Security Group.
- `region` (String) Scaleway region to use (for example `par1`).
- `stateful` (Boolean) Create a stateful security group which allows established connections in and out.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the Security Group.
- `inbound_default_policy` (String) Default policy for incoming traffic.
- `organization` (String) Organization identifier. Exactly one of `project` and `organization` must be specified.
- `organization_default` (Boolean) Create security group to be the default one.
- `outbound_default_policy` (String) Default policy for outcoming traffic.
- `project` (String) Project identifier. Exactly one of `project` and `organization` must be specified.
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the Security Group.

### Read-Only

- `data` (String) This is only present when `state=present`.
